keywords.job: I sell equipment of all sorts.
keywords.name: I am the mourned Ahmet.
keywords.time: It were foolish of me to tell you the time, because then you won't buy a watch.
keywords.temple: The temple is a school for us mourned mortals. The teachings of the temple help us to find our way through our mortal days.
keywords.pharaoh: Our pharaoh holds the key to our ascension. Praised be our pharaoh.
keywords.arkhothep: Blessed be the pharaoh. He is our saviour. I hope that one day I will be chosen.
keywords.oldpharaoh: The foolish old pharaoh withheld knowledge and power from his son, knowing that he would surpass him in every aspects. But his son granted him the chance to ascend.
keywords.ashmunrah: The foolish old pharaoh withheld knowledge and power from his son, knowing that he would surpass him in every aspects. But his son granted him the chance to ascend.
keywords.scarab: The eternal burrowers are the keepers of all the secrets their kind has unearthed in countless aeons.
keywords.chosen: Only the most worthy and pious are chosen to join the armies of the pharaoh. In undeath they follow the path of ascension.
keywords.tibia: The world is nothing but a sigil of death, a monument of decay. We have to attune to death to become one with the world.
keywords.carlin: The vain cities of the Tibian continent think they are at the centre of the universe. Little do they know about the wisdom of the pharaoh.
keywords.thais: The vain cities of the Tibian continent think they are at the centre of the universe. Little do they know about the wisdom of the pharaoh.
keywords.edron: The vain cities of the Tibian continent think they are at the centre of the universe. Little do they know about the wisdom of the pharaoh.
keywords.venore: The vain cities of the Tibian continent think they are at the centre of the universe. Little do they know about the wisdom of the pharaoh.
keywords.kazordoon: We rarely see a traveler of the small folk here.
keywords.dwarves: We rarely see a traveler of the small folk here.
keywords.dwarfes: We rarely see a traveler of the small folk here.
keywords.ab'dendriel: Elves are a rare sight in our lands.
keywords.elves: Elves are a rare sight in our lands.
keywords.elfes: Elves are a rare sight in our lands.
keywords.darama: Life here is harsh, but only this way can we deny the temptations that might damage our Rah and our Uthun to our traitorous flesh.
keywords.darashia: The foolishness of their ways will eventually spell their doom.
keywords.daraman: He was close to the truth, but he lacked the wisdom and vision of our pharaoh.
keywords.ankrahmun: Our city will endure the sands of the desert and the grinding teeth of time.
keywords.mortality: Mortality is our curse. Mourned shall we be.
keywords.false: The great traitors are trying to doom us.
keywords.gods: The great traitors are trying to doom us.
keywords.ascension: Godhood is at our disposal if only we throw of the shackles of mortal flesh.
keywords.Akh'rah: The Akh'rah Uthun is what we are.
keywords.Uthun: The Akh'rah Uthun is what we are.
keywords.Akh: Your cursed bodys are called the Akh. As long as we are alive the Akh makes us weak and vulnerable.
keywords.undead: Undeath is the path to ascension which the chosen may follow.
keywords.undeath: Undeath is the path to ascension which the chosen may follow.
keywords.Rah: The Rah could be called our soul.
keywords.uthun: The Uthun is that what we learn and remember.
keywords.mourn: We are mortals and thus miserable creatures that are to be mourned.
keywords.arena: The arena is east of here.
keywords.palace: The palace is the home of our beloved pharaoh.
keywords.equipment: I sell shovels, picks, scythes, bags, ropes, backpacks, plates, cups, scrolls, documents, parchments, lightsources and watches. Of course, I sell fishing rods, too.
keywords.goods: I sell shovels, picks, scythes, bags, ropes, backpacks, plates, cups, scrolls, documents, parchments, lightsources and watches. Of course, I sell fishing rods, too.
keywords.buy: I sell shovels, picks, scythes, bags, ropes, backpacks, plates, cups, scrolls, documents, parchments, lightsources and watches. Of course, I sell fishing rods, too.
keywords.do: I sell shovels, picks, scythes, bags, ropes, backpacks, plates, cups, scrolls, documents, parchments, lightsources and watches. Of course, I sell fishing rods, too.
keywords.you: I sell shovels, picks, scythes, bags, ropes, backpacks, plates, cups, scrolls, documents, parchments, lightsources and watches. Of course, I sell fishing rods, too.
keywords.sell: I sell shovels, picks, scythes, bags, ropes, backpacks, plates, cups, scrolls, documents, parchments, lightsources and watches. Of course, I sell fishing rods, too.
keywords.have: I sell shovels, picks, scythes, bags, ropes, backpacks, plates, cups, scrolls, documents, parchments, lightsources and watches. Of course, I sell fishing rods, too.
keywords.offer: I sell shovels, picks, scythes, bags, ropes, backpacks, plates, cups, scrolls, documents, parchments, lightsources and watches. Of course, I sell fishing rods, too.
keywords.light: I sell torches, candlesticks, candelabra, and oil.

texts: I sell equipment of all sorts.

entries.response: I hope it will serve you well, my prized customer.
My twelve starving children don't allow me to sell it for less, o grandmaster of haggling.
I hardly can explain to my wife why I gave you that much money.
Sorry, you do not have so many.
